headline: 4 Dividend Kings Are Crushing the S&P 500 in 2026 and Still Have Big Upside Potential
summary: While growth investors scrambled for cover in 2026, a quiet group of battle-tested income stocks started leaving the S&P 500 in the dust. Four Dividend Kings with decades of unbroken payouts are now posting returns that would make most momentum traders jealous, and Wall Street thinks they still have room to run.

headline: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Stock Looks Rich Relative To Its Earnings Valuation
summary: Colgate-Palmolive stock has delivered a 32.4% total return over the past three years, yet there is a clear split in what the valuation tools are saying, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to upside while market multiples suggest the shares are already pricing in a lot of optimism. A 32.4% return over three years suggests Colgate-Palmolive has rewarded patient shareholders, which raises the bar for any new buyers looking for clear value. Stronger cash...

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Colgate-Palmolive, Raises Price Target to $110
summary: Citigroup  analyst Filippo Falorni   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $105 to $110.

headline: Earnings, Inflation, Iran — What’s moving markets
summary: Investing.com - U.S. stock futures were mixed on Tueday as renewed tensions between the United States and Iran kept investors on edge ahead of a pivotal week for markets.
